# Incursa Platform Monorepo

`Incursa.Platform` is the public monorepo for reusable infrastructure/platform libraries. Keep public packages generic, capability-oriented, and explainable without private business or product context. If imported code is useful but not clearly ready for the public package surface, keep it in `incubating/` and mark it non-packable.

## Repository map

- `src/`: public source packages
- `tests/`: unit/integration tests and smoke/sample apps
- `tools/`: shipped analyzers and helper CLIs
- `eng/`: package catalog and release helpers
- `docs/`: architecture, quality policy, and package guidance
- `incubating/`: preserved staging imports and non-public experiments

## Primary solutions

- `Incursa.Platform.slnx`: day-to-day solution for public packages, tests, tools, and monorepo docs
- `Incursa.Platform.CI.slnx`: build/test/pack solution for the public surface
- `Incursa.Platform.Incubating.slnx`: preserved solution for imported code that is intentionally outside default CI/release paths

## Public package families

Core:

- `src/Incursa.Platform/`

Capabilities:

- `src/Incursa.Platform.Audit/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Correlation/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Email/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.ExactlyOnce/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Health/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.HealthProbe/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Idempotency/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Modularity/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Observability/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Operations/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Storage/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Webhooks/`

Providers:

- `src/Incursa.Platform.SqlServer/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Postgres/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.InMemory/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Email.SqlServer/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Email.Postgres/`
- `src/Incursa.Integrations.Storage.Azure/`

Public integrations:

- `src/Incursa.Platform.Audit.WorkOS/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Email.Postmark/`

Hosting adapters:

- `src/Incursa.Platform.Email.AspNetCore/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Health.AspNetCore/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Metrics.AspNetCore/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Metrics.HttpServer/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Modularity.AspNetCore/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Modularity.Razor/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Webhooks.AspNetCore/`

Tools:

- `tools/observability/src/Incursa.Platform.Observability.Analyzers/`
- `tools/testdocs/src/Incursa.TestDocs.Analyzers/`
- `tools/testdocs/src/TestDocs.Cli/`
- `tools/migrations/src/Incursa.Platform.SchemaMigrations.Cli/`

## Imported integration provenance

- `C:\src\incursa\integrations-postmark` was merged into the public email family:
  - `src/Incursa.Platform.Email/`
  - `src/Incursa.Platform.Email.AspNetCore/`
  - `src/Incursa.Platform.Email.Postmark/`
  - `src/Incursa.Platform.Email.SqlServer/`
  - `src/Incursa.Platform.Email.Postgres/`
  - `tests/Incursa.Platform.Email.Tests/`
- `C:\src\incursa\integrations-workos` is preserved under `incubating/workos/`; the public WorkOS slice remains `src/Incursa.Platform.Audit.WorkOS/`
- `C:\src\incursa\integrations-cloudflare` is preserved under `incubating/cloudflare/`
- `C:\src\incursa\integrations-electronicnotary` is preserved under `incubating/electronicnotary/`

See `docs/architecture/imported-integrations.md` for the boundary decisions and resulting landing zones.

## Authoritative governance files

- `eng/package-catalog.json`: authoritative project classification and pack/publish allowlist
- `eng/Generate-PackageCatalog.ps1`: regenerates the catalog from the repo tree
- `eng/Resolve-AffectedProjects.ps1`: calculates changed projects and reverse dependencies
- `eng/Pack-PublicPackages.ps1`: packs only catalog-allowlisted projects
- `docs/architecture/monorepo.md`: package families, zones, and pack/release policy
- `docs/quality/repo-scope-boundary.md`: what belongs in `src/` vs `incubating/`
- `scripts/quality/platform-scope.rules.json`: scope guardrails for provider-token validation
- `incubating/README.md`: staging rules for non-public code

## Pack and release model

- Default all projects to `IsPackable=false`
- Default all builds to `GeneratePackageOnBuild=false`
- Opt public packages and shipped tools in explicitly with `IsPackable=true`
- Keep `incubating/` non-packable and non-publishable
- Use `eng/package-catalog.json` as the allowlist
- Commit CI packs affected public packages only
- Main/release CI packs publishable packages, but nuget.org publication is manual

## Orientation commands

Run these first when you need a current repo map or diagnostics:

```powershell
pwsh -File .codex/skills/dotnet-repo-discovery/scripts/discover-dotnet-repo.ps1
pwsh -File .codex/skills/dotnet-build-diagnostics/scripts/run-build-diagnostics.ps1
pwsh -File .codex/skills/dotnet-format-analyzers/scripts/run-format-analyzers.ps1
```

When tests are involved:

```bash
bash .codex/skills/dotnet-test-triage/scripts/run-test-triage.sh
```

## Validation commands

```powershell
dotnet restore Incursa.Platform.CI.slnx
dotnet tool restore
dotnet build Incursa.Platform.CI.slnx -c Release
dotnet test Incursa.Platform.CI.slnx -c Release
pwsh -File eng/Generate-PackageCatalog.ps1
pwsh -File eng/Pack-PublicPackages.ps1 -Configuration Release -OutputPath ./nupkgs
```
